creator: w@wrzask.pl
text:
> It seems like it is allocation space for < 10k inodes at a time until it
> fails.  When it fails it is trying to allocate space for 1.5g inodes.
> Is that normal?

Check with dumpfs how many inodes are there in your filesystem.
